top_signals.title: Crest Nicholson shares slump as lender talks drag on
top_signals.summary: Crest Nicholson shares dropped after the housebuilder posted a £35m loss and told investors it is still locked in talks with its lenders.  The London-listed firm had delayed the publication of its results in the hopes of seeking emergency permission from its creditors to loosen the terms of its debt, but said on Thursday that [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
